text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that enables machines to mimic human intelligence. At its core, AI involves learning from data rather than following fixed rules. A key part of this is machine learning, where computers improve their performance on tasks through experience. Going further, deep learning uses complex neural networks, similar to the human brain, to analyze large amounts of data. You may not realize it, but AI is already used in daily life—for example, in smartphone voice assistants, personalized recommendations on streaming services, and navigation apps that find the best route. As AI advances, it continues to shape how we work and live.
